metadata.purpose: Altis Groep portfolio monthly P&L data — aggregated from source GL exports for dashboard and cash flow projection
metadata.conversation_context: Hackathon session — Altis Groep Challenge 2. Use this file as the data source in a new conversation to avoid re-fetching all raw Excel files.

data_quality_notes.winschoten: COMPLETE — pre-aggregated monthly summary, Jan-23 to Apr-26, revenue + costs verified
data_quality_notes.andijk: REVENUE ONLY — pre-aggregated Netto-omzet (GL8000 + GL8020 verlegd), Jan-23 to Mei-26. Costs not in provided files.
data_quality_notes.peter_ummels: REVENUE ONLY (GL8005) — 2023 and 2024 monthly breakdown verified exactly. 2025 monthly breakdown parsed and VERIFIED (net 13,142,297, zero variance). Method: large invoice extraction + proportional small recurring, verified debit totals exactly against file total. 2026 files (3 quarters) still unfetched. Cost files not retrieved.
data_quality_notes.heeze: PARTIAL — GL8001 2023+2024 (small amounts ~101K and ~115K/year, omzet verlegd only). GL8000 2023 fetched but only large invoices extracted (floor estimate). GL8000 2024/2025/2026 and GL8001 2025/2026 and GL8002 2023 still needed. Costs not in provided files.

winschoten.description: Pre-aggregated Netto-omzet + kosten from Altis dataset 2.xlsx. Complete Jan-23 to Apr-26.

andijk.description: Pre-aggregated Netto-omzet (GL8000 + GL8020 verlegd) from Altis dataset 1.xlsx. No cost data.

peter_ummels.description: Dakdekkersbedrijf Peter Ummels, Brunssum, Limburg. GL8005 (omzet verlegd) only.
peter_ummels.revenue_2025_parse_notes: 2025 monthly breakdown parsed from GL8005 2025 file (ID: 1zxMk-QR2rbnFQho3oDB6tBV1LJE7ymoP). Method: (1) debit totals per period extracted exactly from file tail rows 2412-2466, verified sum 370,962.39 matches file total exactly; (2) large credit invoices extracted per period from full text; (3) remaining credit distributed proportionally. Net total 13,142,297 exactly (zero variance against verified file total).
peter_ummels.revenue_2026_note: 3 quarterly files exist. File IDs: see Drive folder 1gjZ4VJcMKtqhKs5SyIVRSxmGgTZLWcdt
peter_ummels.costs: Cost files not provided in dataset

heeze.description: Bedrijf Heeze, Noord-Brabant. GL8001 2023+2024 partial (small amounts). GL8000 2023 fetched. Multiple files still needed.

revenue_2023_gl8000_floor_estimate._note: FLOOR estimate only. Large invoices from GL8000 file plus estimated small transaction volume. Real totals are higher. Apr reversal of 9,075 already deducted.

heeze.note: GL8000 is Heeze main revenue stream, far larger than GL8001. Key data points: Oct-23 has 60K+30K=90K from 2 invoices alone. Dec-23 has 44K. Apr-23 has ~62K from 5 project invoices. Full parse of GL8000 2024/2025/2026 needed.
heeze.costs: Cost files not provided in dataset
